reasoning: The panel achieves solid internal warm harmony — parchment cream background, golden amber border, warm brown (not pure black) shadow accents, and item icons in forest green / sunset orange / crimson red all pull from the correct warm-earth quadrant of the Echoes palette. Shadow/border darks are warm brown (~#5A3020 range), never pure black — good. However the panel falls short of the BRIGHT target: dominant hues are muted parchment and desaturated tan (slot background rectangles read as muddy warm-grey, not vivid), and the entire cool half of the Echoes palette (sky blues, candy pinks, teal highlights) is completely absent. Icon saturation is moderate not punchy. The result is 'warm vintage tavern inventory' rather than the BRIGHT harmonious target. No pure black or cold corporate grey within the UI elements themselves, which is the main pass criterion, but insufficiently vibrant to score higher.
